153.reason: [The variable 'tmp' was computed before 'advance()' was called, so it uses the old 'currentChar' and 'peekNextChar()', but after 'advance()', 'currentChar' has changed. Thus, when appending 'currentChar' here, it's actually the second character of the original pair, but the condition is checked against the outdated 'tmp'. This causes incorrect handling of two-character operators.]
